text.tspan: u2022 Consensus (Raft/Paxos) is SLOW u2014 every write costs an RTT to majority.
You can't afford it on every data write.
u2022 But you DO need strong consistency for METADATA u2014 must not split-brain
u2022 Solution: small consensus core for metadata only;
large eventually-consistent data layer that consults the core occasionally.
u2022 The metadata change rate is low (cluster events) vs the data rate (per request),
so the consensus overhead is amortized.
u2022 which node owns which shard
u2022 current leader of each replication group
u2022 who's leader of shard X?
u2022 acquire lease on resource Y
u2022 register myself as a member
